item.title: Notiqflow 0.4.1
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.4.1

  • Correction prompts now appear right where you're typing. When Notiqflow notices you fixing a dictated word, the "Always change…?" prompt now pops up in a small card directly above the word you corrected — no more glancing down at the Flow Bar. The card never steals focus, follows along if you keep refining the word, and hides while you're in another app. In apps that don't expose text positions, the prompt falls back to the Flow Bar as before.
